stemHtml:
You are supposed to fly above a mountain which has a peak of 8600 feet on a westbound VFR flight. The ISA deviation in the area is - 9 degrees Celsius and the local QNH is 0995 hPa. What is the lowest usable flight level for this segment of the flight?

Note that you are expected to clear terrain by 2000 ft. Assume 1 hPa = 27 ft.
